Document:
# Guard
Guards are the law enforcement of CrystallEdge. They patrol the settlement, respond to crimes, protect citizens, and maintain order. A Guard's presence deters trouble — and when trouble arrives anyway, they are the first to respond.
## Responsibilities
- Patrol the settlement and surrounding areas - Respond to crimes, fights, and disturbances - Arrest and detain rule-breakers - Escort valuable goods or people when needed - Coordinate with the Guard Commander
## Starting Equipment
Guards choose their weapons at spawn: iron sword, spear, war hammer, axe, scimitar, two-handed sword, or a combat bow. Chainmail shirt, chainmail skirt, and a helmet are provided. A guard cloak identifies you to citizens.
## Requirements
None — Guard is open to any player. Salary: [bold]50 coins[/bold] per cycle.
## Tips
- Patrol in pairs when possible — a lone guard is an easy target - Know the [bold]Imperial Laws[/bold] before making any arrest - The Guard Commander sets priorities — check in with them at the start of the round - Use [textlink="Combat" link="OE14Combat"] to sharpen your fighting skills
